overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character navigates wet streets, crosses an intersection, passes beneath an elevated highway overpass, and traverses urban canyons surrounded by towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban intersection with digital billboards

events.description: futuristic vehicle passes by from right to left across the intersection
begins crossing the wet street toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a neon-lit intersection, observing the large digital billboards and wet pavement reflections

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements with blue and pink neon colors
tall buildings covered in neon signage and holographic displays
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings
low concrete barrier with metal railings separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
vertical digital billboard displaying animated ramen noodle advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide neon-lit intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant pink and blue neon lights. The player character walks forward and crosses the street as a futuristic vehicle passes through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters covered roadway beneath elevated highway, sky becomes obscured by concrete overpass
ambient light decreases significantly as the camera moves deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp into a covered roadway beneath an elevated highway, flanked by concrete walls and metal guardrails

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure forming a roof over the roadway
yellow and black striped metal safety barrier along the left side of the road
tall concrete wall with weathered texture lining the right side of the covered road
gigantic skyscraper visible in the distance, illuminated with bright pink neon vertical lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, covered roadway beneath an elevated highway overpass. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed with concrete walls and metal guardrails. In the distance, a massive neon-lit skyscraper becomes visible through the end of the tunnel-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon beneath overpass with view of mega towers

events.description: light rain begins falling, visible as particles against the neon-lit buildings
camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and neon signs above

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the overpass while looking up at the massive neon-lit skyscrapers towering overhead

entered.detail: tall modern buildings with glass facades illuminated by internal and external lighting
floating holographic advertisement display projecting above the street level
underside of the elevated highway showing concrete beams and support structures

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the camera reveals a breathtaking view of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers illuminated with vibrant pink and blue neon lights. Light rain begins to fall as the camera tilts upward to admire the scale of the mega-structures and holographic advertisements floating above.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with ground-level commercial buildings

events.description: exits the covered overpass area back onto open city street with visible storefronts
passes a parked vehicle on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the wet city street past commercial buildings and palm trees, approaching distant traffic

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan parked along the curb on the right side of the street

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with illuminated storefront windows and signage at street level
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
lit shop windows displaying merchandise and neon signs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens onto a city street lined with ground-level commercial buildings and palm trees. The wet pavement continues to reflect the neon lights from the distant mega-towers now visible to the left. The player passes a parked vehicle and continues through the urban environment with storefronts visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched intersection into the oppressive shadow of an overpass before emerging into a rain-slicked urban corridor. It begins by crossing a wet asphalt street reflecting vibrant pink and blue lights as a futuristic vehicle glides through the intersection. The environment then constricts as the camera moves beneath an elevated highway, shifting from the open city to a dark, enclosed space of concrete walls and metal guardrails. As the camera passes under the massive structure, the view expands to reveal towering mega-structures and floating holographic advertisements while a light rain begins to fall. Finally, the scene opens up again upon exiting the overpass, moving past palm trees and parked vehicles along a street lined with storefronts and the distant glow of skyscrapers.
